checks.detail: instruction.md, task.toml, environment/Dockerfile, and tests/test.sh all exist.
solution/solve.sh, oracle.yaml, and job.yaml all present.
Dockerfile installs git and tmux via apt-get.
tests/ contains extra files (compute_reward.py, run_all.py) that should live in environment/tests/.
reasons: compute_reward.py and run_all.py present in tests/ alongside test.sh

checks.detail: Stray ANTI_CHEAT.md file at task root; no .gitignore present.
reasons: ANTI_CHEAT.md at root is not a recognized task file

notes: Move tests/compute_reward.py and tests/run_all.py to environment/tests/ and COPY them into the image at build time; tests/ should contain only test.sh.
Remove or relocate ANTI_CHEAT.md (e.g., into docs/ or merge into README.md) so the task root contains only Harbor-recognized files.
Add a .gitignore to exclude jobs/, results/, qa-logs/, __pycache__/, and .DS_Store.
